source: roguey.co.uk v9.0 weapons list (user-supplied paste); burst DPS / decomposed values
instructions: Fill missileDamage (+optional missileSpeed) per launcher, then: npm run data. Missile DPS assumes ammo resupply; ship missile storage still limits real fights.
